hunt_intro: Welcome to the Edge AI Treasure Hunt! 7 clues to crack. Text CLUE 1 to start. Each answer unlocks the next. Decode them all to claim your prize at the demo station.

clues.clue: CLUE 1: I weigh 400MB but hold 2.4 billion secrets. My weights are only three values. What am I? (Hint: ask the system about its architecture)
clues.success: Correct! BitNet b1.58-2B-4T. Text CLUE 2 for your next challenge.
clues.hint: Try texting: What model does this system use?

clues.clue: CLUE 2: The architect behind this SMS system goes by 'Kersh'. What company does Kersh work for? (Hint: ask about speakers)
clues.success: Correct! Red Hat. Text CLUE 3 for your next challenge.
clues.hint: Try texting: Who built the SMS AI assistant?

clues.clue: CLUE 3: The BitNet model has 2.4 billion parameters but only uses 3 possible weight values. How many megabytes does the model file take? (Hint: ask about the architecture)
clues.success: 400MB for 2.4B params — that's 1-bit efficiency! Text CLUE 4.
clues.hint: Try texting: How big is the BitNet model?

clues.clue: CLUE 4: How many CPU cores does one edge node use? Multiply by the number of days the conference runs. What's the answer?
clues.hint: Try texting: How many CPU cores does this system use? And: How many days is Summit Connect?

clues.clue: CLUE 5: Intel's matrix instruction set that accelerates AI has 3 letters. Red Hat's edge Kubernetes has 10 letters. Combine them into one word.
clues.success: AMXMicroShift — the Intel + Red Hat edge stack! Text CLUE 6.
clues.hint: Try texting: What Intel technology accelerates AI? And: What is Red Hat's edge Kubernetes?

clues.clue: CLUE 6: What percentage of conference questions can be answered in under 1 second without calling the LLM? (Hint: ask about RAG-direct)
clues.success: 60-70%% instant answers via RAG-direct. Final clue! Text CLUE 7.
clues.hint: Try texting: What is RAG-direct? How fast is it?

clues.clue: CLUE 7: Take the first letter of the Model name (B), the OS image format (B), and the container base version (U). What 3 letters do you get?
clues.success: YOU CRACKED THE CODE! Screenshot this message and show it at the demo station to claim your prize. Congratulations, edge AI decoder!
clues.hint: Model = BitNet (B), OS = bootc (B), container = UBI9 (U). The letters are B, B, U.
